name: ZenithScholar (BTVerse Research Ethics)
description: A comprehensive research training platform offering courses on research methodologies, ethics, and academic writing. Features interactive quizzes, expert instructors, and verified certificates for students pursuing academic excellence.

name: Cam Chop - Food Delivery App
description: A full-featured food delivery platform connecting restaurants, dashers, and customers. Offers grocery delivery, convenience store services, and a membership program with premium benefits.

name: YouTube Video Downloader
description: A command-line tool and web application for downloading YouTube videos in multiple quality formats. Supports batch downloads and playlist extraction with an intuitive interface.

name: Personal Portfolio
description: A modern, fully responsive portfolio website showcasing projects, skills, and professional experience. Features smooth animations, interactive sections, and a glass-morphism design.
